title: A Shared Experience
description: Have you ever wondered what Minecraft would be like if you and your friends had a shared inventory and health? Look no further than A Shared Experience!
body:
![ASE logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a29828b84b00ad7c42674a6dda1485609f97c13e.png)

## What is A Shared Experience?
A Shared Experience is a modpack built to bring you and your friends together for a fun new experience in Minecraft. You and your friends will share **Health** and **Inventory**.
_This can either make friendships, or break friendships. You have been warned_

## What does this mean?
> ### Shared Inventory
> If you pick up something, the item is shared across all inventories. This also means that if you were to die, all the items that dropped at your death point, everyone looses those items. TLDR you share an inventory.
> _I will explain this better later on, please be patient with us._
> 
> ### Shared Health
> If one of you takes damage, all of you take damage.
> 
> ### TLDR
> This modpack makes it so that every player inside of the world is the same player. Everyone shares everything.
> _I know this poorly explained, please be patient with us as we work on a better description._

## What is the vision behind A Shared Experience?
Our endgoal with this pack is to create something that hasent been done before, a unique experience that you cant find elsewhere. We hope that the contents of this pack find you well and that you enjoy everything that comes packaged with **A Shared Experience**.

![Array Studios mark.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7faf1c12e8267411ed2cfa0f9281d5856766afa.png)
